overall.description: Gameplay footage from Warhammer 40,000: Space Marine 2 featuring a third-person perspective of an Ultramarine in heavy blue power armor. The character navigates dark, fog-filled industrial corridors of a space hulk, joining squad mates and interacting with machinery while progressing through atmospheric sci-fi environments.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial maintenance bay with scattered debris

events.description: character acquires frag grenades from supply crate on the floor

agents.ego_description: heavily armored Space Marine moving cautiously through the industrial bay, weapon at ready while collecting ammunition

entered.detail: rusted metal grating covering the floor with visible gaps and industrial texture
large cylindrical pipes running vertically along the walls
scattered mechanical wreckage and loose cables on the ground
small military container holding frag grenade ammunition

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dimly lit industrial maintenance bay with metal grating floors and scattered debris. The Space Marine character moves through the environment, picking up frag grenades from a supply crate before proceeding toward a tunnel opening. The atmosphere is hazy with artificial blue lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: long industrial tunnel with massive ventilation fan at terminus

events.description: character transitions from walking to running pace
squad mate joins the player from the right side, running alongside

agents.ego_description: Space Marine running through the corridor toward the large ventilation fan, accompanied by a fellow marine

notable_agents.action: fellow Space Marine in blue armor running alongside the player character

entered.detail: giant rotating industrial fan with six blades blocking the tunnel end
curved metal walls with ribbed structural reinforcement
dense tangle of pipes and cables suspended from the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character moves into a long industrial tunnel with ribbed metal walls, accompanied by a squad mate. They run toward a massive rotating ventilation fan at the tunnel's end, with overhead pipes and cables visible against the hazy blue lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: debris-filled tunnel section past the ventilation system

events.description: passing through the ventilation fan area into darker, debris-filled corridor

agents.ego_description: continuing to run through the darker section of the tunnel, navigating past scattered rubble alone

entered.detail: broken metal pieces and rubble littering the floor
small blue emergency lights embedded along the floor edges

segments.scene_description: Having passed the massive fan, the character moves through a darker, low-lit section of the tunnel filled with scattered debris. The squad mate is no longer visible, and blue emergency lights line the floor as the environment becomes more claustrophobic.

scene_state.functional_zone: squad rendezvous point with heavy blast door and control console

events.description: environment lighting shifts from blue to warm yellow emergency lighting
character interacts with door console to hack and open the heavy blast doors

agents.ego_description: approaching squad mates and hacking the door console to open the blast doors and proceed

notable_agents.action: squad mate standing guard near the heavy blast door
marine waiting by the wall near the door console

entered.detail: large industrial door with circular locking mechanism and red warning stripes
glowing green control panel mounted on the wall for door operation
warm yellow lighting fixtures casting amber glow on walls

segments.scene_description: The character enters a squad rendezvous area illuminated by yellow emergency lights, where two fellow marines wait near a heavy blast door. The character approaches and interacts with a green-lit door console to hack the locking mechanism, preparing to open the path forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: red-lit industrial corridor beyond the security door

events.description: blast doors open revealing corridor with red emergency lighting beyond
character sprints forward through the newly opened doorway

agents.ego_description: Space Marine charging through the opened door into the red-lit hallway, following a squad mate ahead

notable_agents.action: squad mate moving ahead into the red-lit corridor

entered.detail: pulsing red emergency lights indicating danger or alert status
large industrial equipment visible through the haze down the corridor

segments.scene_description: The blast doors open to reveal a corridor bathed in red emergency lighting. The character sprints through the doorway, following a squad mate ahead into the hazardous area. Industrial pipes line the walls as red alarm lights pulse, creating an urgent atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous progression through a derelict industrial complex that shifts from a hazy blue maintenance area into a high-alert red emergency zone. It begins in a dimly lit maintenance bay where the Space Marine gathers supplies from a crate before moving toward a tunnel opening. As the character enters a long, ribbed corridor, the camera follows them and a squad mate toward a massive rotating ventilation fan under a canopy of overhead pipes. The scene then shifts into a darker, more claustrophobic stretch of tunnel lined with blue floor lights and scattered debris before opening into a rendezvous area illuminated by yellow emergency lighting. Finally, after the character hacks a green-lit console to unlock a heavy blast door, the environment transforms into a corridor of pulsing red alarm lights as the squad sprints forward into the hazardous zone.
